today_trades.rationale: AFRM is displaying extreme multi-oscillator overbought confluence — the clearest mean-reversion short setup in today's scan. RSI = 90.5 (extreme, well above the 70 overbought threshold and nowhere near the 25 hard-stop RSI floor), Williams %R = -7.4 (OVERBOUGHT zone, above -20), Stochastic %K = 92.6 (OVERBOUGHT, and K is above D suggesting rollover risk), BB %B = 1.033 (ABOVE upper band). This is 4-of-4 oscillator overbought agreement — highest possible confluence signal per our framework. Regime is NEUTRAL (shorts permitted). No fundamental catalyst found in last 24h news scan justifying this extension — the run is purely technical momentum with no earnings, no M&A, no guidance raise. MACD is still positive but histogram narrowing. Short criteria met: (2) extreme technical overbought condition + (4) NEUTRAL regime allows shorts. Volume ratio was 2.82x previous hour = momentum crowd piling in at the top. With 5 existing long positions we have exactly 1 slot. IMPORTANT: AFRM is not on the banned ticker list. RSI 90.5 >> 25 (not a capitulation scenario). ATR = $0.747/share, 2.5x ATR stop = ~$1.87. Entry ~$60.82 (live ask). NOTE: We currently have 5 open long positions.
